query:
SELECT 
  p.paymentId,
  p.eventType as confirmed_type,
  s.mandateId,
  s.userId
FROM gc_payment_events p
LEFT JOIN gc_payment_events s ON s.paymentId = p.paymentId AND s.eventType = 'payments_pending_submission' AND s.mandateId IS NOT NULL
WHERE p.userId IS NULL 
  AND p.eventType IN ('payments_confirmed', 'payments_paid_out')
  AND s.mandateId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT 
  p.paymentId,
  p.eventType as confirmed_type,
  s.mandateId,
  s.userId
FROM gc_payment_events p
LEFT JOIN gc_payment_events s ON s.paymentId = p.paymentId AND s.eventType = 'payments_pending_submission' AND s.mandateId IS NOT NULL
WHERE p.userId IS NULL 
  AND p.eventType IN ('payments_confirmed', 'payments_paid_out')
  AND s.mandateId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10;
